meta_title: Website for Photographer — Create in 5 Minutes | Promto
meta_description: Create a photographer website with AI in 5 minutes. Beautiful gallery, booking form, SEO optimization. Attract clients for shoots. Try free.
og_description: AI will create a photographer website in 5 minutes: gallery, portfolio, booking form. Attract clients for shoots without code.
hero_subtitle: AI will create a site with gallery and booking form — start accepting orders today.
hero_placeholder: Describe what website you need for your business...

advantages.title: Beautiful Work Gallery
advantages.description: Showcase your best photos in a professional gallery with masonry grid and lightbox viewer.

advantages.title: Quick Launch
advantages.description: Photographer website ready in 5 minutes: describe your style and specialization — AI will do the rest.

advantages.title: Photo Session Booking Form
advantages.description: Built-in inquiry form allows clients to easily contact you and book a photo session date.

advantages.title: Visible in Search
advantages.description: SEO optimization helps clients find you by queries like "photographer + city" on Google and Yandex.

advantages.title: Price List & Services
advantages.description: Place service packages and prices right on the site — clients know the cost upfront and come prepared.

advantages.title: Fast Photo Loading
advantages.description: Automatic image optimization — the site loads fast even with dozens of photos in the gallery.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Specialization
how_it_works.description: Tell what shoots you do — weddings, portraits, commercial photography, event coverage.

how_it_works.title: AI Creates the Site
how_it_works.description: System generates a site with gallery, services section, pricing, and booking form tailored for photographers.

how_it_works.title: Upload Photos
how_it_works.description: Add your best work from your portfolio — these become the main argument for clients.

how_it_works.title: Receive Inquiries
how_it_works.description: Publish the site, add to social media, and start receiving inquiries from new clients.

faq.question: What photography genres does the photographer template support?
faq.answer: AI adapts the site for any specialization: wedding, children, portrait, product, commercial photography, event coverage, and other genres.

faq.question: Can I place a price list on the photographer's website?
faq.answer: Yes. You can add a section with service packages and prices — this reduces questions and speeds up client decision-making.

faq.question: How will clients book photo sessions through the site?
faq.answer: There's a built-in inquiry form on the site. Client leaves name, contact, and preferences — you get a notification via email or messenger.

faq.question: Are photos optimized for fast loading?
faq.answer: Yes. Promto automatically compresses and converts images to modern formats so the site loads fast without quality loss.

faq.question: What is Promto?
faq.answer: Promto is an AI website builder. You describe your business, and the system creates a ready site with texts, design, and structure in minutes.

faq.question: How much does a photographer website cost on Promto?
faq.answer: You can create a basic site for free. Paid plans add custom domain, additional pages, and extended analytics.

cta_mid_subtitle: Create a photographer website in 5 minutes and start receiving photo session inquiries.
cta_final_subtitle: AI will create gallery, pricing, and booking form in minutes. Free.
